decisions.decision: Ran the 01-01 executor in sequential mode (no worktree isolation) instead of the default worktree mode for this single-plan wave
decisions.rationale: Conserve orchestrator context; no parallelism benefit for a single-plan wave, and worktree manifest bookkeeping had tooling friction (mktemp behavior) in this environment.
